user.title: Connect your SAUR account
user.description: Enter your SAUR customer portal credentials (same as mon-espace.saurclient.fr).

data_description.login: Your SAUR customer portal login email.
data_description.password: Your SAUR customer portal password. Stored locally and never shared.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SAURon
reauth_confirm.description: Your SAUR credentials are no longer valid for subscription **{subscription_id}**. Enter new credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the SAUR API. Check your internet connection.
error.wrong_account: These credentials belong to a different SAUR account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This SAUR subscription is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval_h: How often to query the SAUR API. SAUR updates data once per day (J-1), so values below 4h are rarely useful.
data_description.stale_data_threshold_h: Raise a Home Assistant alert if the latest meter reading is older than this many hours.

stale_data.title: Stale SAUR water data
stale_data.description: The latest reading for subscription `{subscription_id}` is **{age_h} hours** old.
